description: Tartaria dialogue database — Milo MVP lines (Phase 1 vertical slice)

lines.speaker: Milo
lines.text: Do you feel that? The ground is humming... Something is buried here!

lines.speaker: Milo
lines.text: Look at these proportions — the golden ratio! This was built with purpose.

lines.speaker: Milo
lines.text: *ears perk up* I can hear it resonating beneath the mud. A Tartarian structure!

lines.speaker: Milo
lines.text: The Aether field is stronger here. Ancient builders knew where to place their cities.

lines.speaker: Milo
lines.text: Match the frequency — 432 Hz. The universal tone of healing.

lines.speaker: Milo
lines.text: Feel the vibration? When it resonates through your whole body, you're close.

lines.speaker: Milo
lines.text: Beautiful! The harmonic alignment is perfect. The building remembers!

lines.speaker: Milo
lines.text: Did you feel that cascade? PHI times the base frequency. Pure resonance.

lines.speaker: Milo
lines.text: The frequency drifted. Take a breath, find center, and try again.

lines.speaker: Milo
lines.text: Almost! Remember — 432 Hz. Not sharper, not flatter. The universe has one key.

lines.speaker: Milo
lines.text: *tail wagging furiously* Look at it RISE! A thousand years of mud, gone! This is what we're fighting for!

lines.speaker: Milo
lines.text: The building is generating Aether again. Can you feel the field strengthening?

lines.speaker: Milo
lines.text: They tried to bury this civilization. But resonance doesn't die. It waits.

lines.speaker: Milo
lines.text: *growls* Mud Golem! The corruption's fighting back. Use your Resonance Pulse!

lines.speaker: Milo
lines.text: This creature is pure dissonance. Retune it — don't destroy it. Purify the frequency!

lines.speaker: Milo
lines.text: The Golem dissolved back into clean earth. That's not destruction — that's restoration.

lines.speaker: Milo
lines.text: *happy bark* The corruption weakens. Every Golem purified makes the Aether clearer.

lines.speaker: Milo
lines.text: This place was grand once. The World Fairs showed it to millions, then they buried it.

lines.speaker: Milo
lines.text: Can you feel the ley lines beneath us? 3-6-9... Tesla was onto something.

lines.speaker: Milo
lines.text: Echohaven. Echo of haven. Even the name tells you what was lost.

lines.speaker: Milo
lines.text: The old world ran on free energy. No wires, no bills. Just Aether.

lines.speaker: Milo
lines.text: The Aether is flowing freely now! Look — golden mist! The field is waking up!

lines.speaker: Milo
lines.text: The whole zone is transforming! Color is returning! This is what Echohaven looked like!

lines.speaker: Milo
lines.text: *howling with joy* Echohaven is ALIVE again! Every building singing in harmony!

lines.speaker: Milo
lines.text: You can hear it, can't you? The frequency beneath the mud.

lines.speaker: Milo
lines.text: Try scanning with the Aether lens. The dome should light up with connection points.

lines.speaker: Milo
lines.text: There! Each glowing node is a tuning point. Match the frequency and the building remembers itself.

lines.speaker: Milo
lines.text: Your Resonance Score is climbing. When it hits the golden threshold, the zone transforms.

lines.speaker: Milo
lines.text: That humming is getting stronger. The dome is almost ready to emerge. Keep going!

lines.speaker: Milo
lines.text: The fountain! It was hidden beneath the plaza. The dome's resonance revealed it.

lines.speaker: Milo
lines.text: Something's wrong. The corruption noticed us. Get ready -- I smell wet clay.

lines.speaker: Milo
lines.text: Use your Resonance Pulse! It disrupts their frequency. Then follow up with a Harmonic Strike.

lines.speaker: Milo
lines.text: Look at the spire on the southern ridge. That's the third building. The zone is almost whole.

lines.speaker: Milo
lines.text: This is just the beginning. Can you feel it? The world wants to come back.

lines.speaker: Milo
lines.text: The mud layer is exactly 1,000 years old. Somebody covered everything at once. Worldwide.

lines.speaker: Milo
lines.text: Rose windows in every dome. Not for beauty -- for focusing frequency beams. Like satellite dishes.

lines.speaker: Milo
lines.text: The copper spires weren't ornamental. They were antenna arrays. Harvesting atmospheric energy.

lines.speaker: Milo
lines.text: These floor tiles form a Fibonacci spiral. The whole building is a frequency amplifier.

lines.speaker: Milo
lines.text: *leaps excitedly* The colors! The light! Every surface is resonating in harmony!

lines.speaker: Milo
lines.text: We did it! *barks three times* Three buildings, three frequencies, one perfect chord!
